releaseNotes.headline: Lighter, steadier background monitoring
releaseNotes.summary: Version 0.2.2 reduces long-running memory growth while keeping live Codex usage and session updates immediate.

highlights.title: Lower memory use
highlights.detail: Codex pipe-read buffers are released promptly, keeping usAIge lean during long monitoring sessions.

highlights.title: Live updates stay immediate
highlights.detail: Usage limits and Codex session status continue to update from live events without slower polling.
